2228170.name: OMSI 2 Add-on Coach O560 Series
2228170.description:
Coach O560 Series – add-on for OMSI 2 is a pack of legendary coaches intended for intercity lines and medium distance lines. Manufactured in Turkey from 2006 to 2020, those coaches were dedicated to the European market. Most popular in Germany and all over the Europe.

Addon include 22 main versions that differ lengths, interior equipment, engines, EURO V versions to EURO VI Facelift versions. Vehicles offers realistic 3d model, textures, sounds and behavior.

Coaches can be customized by 12 setvars with included liveries from all the world.

Features:

  • 22 versions:
    o Lengths: 12,14m (standard), 12.64m and 12.98m (EURO VI M and EURO V M), 13.32m (EURO VI L)
    o Standard equipment: Classic versions, Comfort versions, Lite versions
    o Engines : OM 926 210kW (Euro V), OM 457 220kW (Euro V), OM 936 220kW (Euro VI), OM 936 260kW (Euro VI Comfort versions)
  • Realistic sounds, models, behavior, and animations
  • Adjustable steering column and retarder on the steering wheel buttons
  • 12 setvars
  • Authentic manual gearbox behavior
  • Automatic versions
  • Coaches are repaintable with templates
2228170.supported_languages:
英语, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
